resume_snippets.title: Backend Engineering Lead at TechCorp
resume_snippets.text: Led architecture and delivery of microservices platform using Python and AWS, reducing API latency by 40% and supporting 10M+ daily requests across 5 services.

resume_snippets.title: Full Stack Engineer at StartupXYZ
resume_snippets.text: Built REST APIs with Django and React frontends, implemented automated testing (pytest, mocha), and deployed infrastructure using Docker and Kubernetes on AWS.

resume_snippets.title: Python & Backend Development
resume_snippets.text: Expert in Python (8+ years), Django REST Framework, FastAPI, async programming (asyncio), and designing scalable backend systems for high-traffic applications.

resume_snippets.title: DevOps & Cloud Infrastructure
resume_snippets.text: Proficient in Docker, Kubernetes, AWS services (EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda), CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins), and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform).

resume_snippets.title: Frontend Development
resume_snippets.text: Strong experience with React, Vue.js, TypeScript, responsive design, and modern JavaScript (ES6+). Built responsive dashboards and real-time UIs.

resume_snippets.title: Databases & SQL
resume_snippets.text: Deep expertise in PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, query optimization, and designing scalable database schemas. Experience with Redis for caching and pub/sub.

resume_snippets.title: Performance Optimization Project
resume_snippets.text: Redesigned database queries and added caching layer (Redis), reducing page load time from 3s to 400ms (87% improvement) and saving $50K/year in infrastructure costs.

resume_snippets.title: Team Productivity Initiative
resume_snippets.text: Established automated testing and CI/CD pipeline, reducing deployment time from 2 hours to 15 minutes and cutting production bugs by 60% in 6 months.

resume_snippets.title: Open Source Contributions
resume_snippets.text: Active contributor to FastAPI and Django projects with 500+ GitHub stars. Published 3 technical blog posts on microservices architecture reaching 50K+ views.

resume_snippets.title: Team Lead & Mentoring
resume_snippets.text: Managed team of 5 engineers, conducted code reviews, mentored 3 junior developers (2 promoted within 18 months), and fostered agile/scrum practices.

resume_snippets.title: Cross-functional Collaboration
resume_snippets.text: Partnered with product, design, and data teams to define technical requirements, resolve blockers, and deliver features on schedule for enterprise clients.

resume_snippets.title: Architecture & Technical Strategy
resume_snippets.text: Designed system architecture for new product line supporting 100K+ concurrent users. Led migration from monolith to microservices (6-month project, on-time and on-budget).

resume_snippets.title: Machine Learning & Data
resume_snippets.text: Familiar with Python ML libraries (scikit-learn, pandas, numpy), data pipelines, and basic ML model training. Experience with data analysis and visualization (matplotlib, seaborn).

resume_snippets.title: Security Best Practices
resume_snippets.text: Implemented OAuth 2.0 and JWT authentication, SQL injection prevention, API rate limiting, and security testing. Passed security audits for HIPAA and SOC 2 compliance.

resume_snippets.title: Consultant - Contract Work
resume_snippets.text: Worked with 3+ clients on short-term projects: migrating legacy systems to cloud, building REST APIs, and implementing automated deployment pipelines using GitHub Actions.
